code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const categories=[{name:"Food",icon:"🍔"},{name:"Transport",icon:"🚗"},{name:"Entertainment",icon:"🎬"},{name:"Shopping",icon:"🛍️"},{name:"Bills",icon:"💡"},{name:"Health",icon:"💊"},{name:"Education",icon:"📚"},{name:"Travel",icon:"✈️"},{name:"Subscriptions",icon:"📺"},{name:"Gifts",icon:"🎁"},{name:"Charity",icon:"🙏"},{name:"Pet",icon:"🐶"},{name:"Maintenance",icon:"🛠️"},{name:"Fuel",icon:"⛽"},{name:"Other",icon:"✨"}];const ExpenseForm=_ref=>{let{onAddExpense}=_ref;const[category,setCategory]=useState("");const[amount,setAmount]=useState("");const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const num=Number(amount);if(!category||!amount||num<=0)return;onAddExpense({category,amount:num});setCategory("");setAmount("");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"form expense-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Add Expense"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"category-grid",children:categories.map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`category-item ${category===cat.name?"selected":""}`,onClick:()=>setCategory(cat.name),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"icon",children:cat.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:cat.name})]},cat.name))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",placeholder:"Amount",value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value),min:"0",step:"0.01"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Add Expense"})]});};export default ExpenseForm;
